'''Glymph Pie''' was a dish native to the [[Glymphid/Legends|Glymphids]] of [[Ploo II/Legends|Ploo II]]. [[Windsnake]]s, [[banthaweed]], and [[fantazi mushroom]]s were ingredients.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1stm}}
